phase_progress: Phase 9 executing: 8/11 changes DONE. C-005b landed: provider-default (default_model) now persists to the store via the override-RwLock pattern (write/overlay/seed); MockKernelBuilder isolates test storage to a tempdir; full-router HTTP CRUD test added. Generic config_set deferred to C-005c (needs a kernel config-override merge layer). MCP + provider-default config is now fully DB-authoritative and read-only-config.toml-safe. Next C-008 (one-time prod config.toml -> DB import CLI + HUMAN cluster verify) -> C-009 (K8s ConfigMap revert, HARD-GATED on C-008 prod verify). C-005c is a future follow-up.

next_action.description: Add `librefang storage config-import` CLI to seed the existing prod config.toml into the DB store; HUMAN runs + verifies it on the cluster before C-009 — M
